name: Tetsuya Masuda
title: Chief Executive Officer
bio: Leading Nomura's global strategy with over 25 years of experience in investment banking, trading, and asset management. Committed to driving sustainable growth and innovation across all business segments.

name: Yuki Tanaka
title: Chief Financial Officer
bio: Manages financial strategy and capital allocation with expertise in financial planning, risk management, and corporate governance. Ensures optimal resource allocation across the organization.

name: Hiroshi Yamamoto
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Oversees all investment strategy and portfolio management across equities, fixed income, derivatives, and alternatives. Drives superior risk-adjusted returns for all stakeholders.

name: Akira Suzuki
title: Global Head of Equities
bio: Leads equity investment strategy and execution with deep expertise in global markets. Focuses on identifying value opportunities and building resilient portfolios.

name: Kenji Nakamura
title: Head of Fixed Income
bio: Manages fixed income portfolio with disciplined approach to credit analysis and yield optimization. Seeks attractive opportunities in corporate bonds and government securities.

name: Masako Yamada
title: Global Head of Derivatives
bio: Leads derivatives strategy and risk management across global markets. Utilizes sophisticated models and expertise to optimize portfolio returns and manage risk exposure.

name: Takeshi Harada
title: Head of Alternative Investments
bio: Drives alternative investment strategy including private equity, hedge funds, and structured products. Seeks uncorrelated returns and portfolio diversification benefits.

name: Sakura Kimura
title: Chief Risk Officer
bio: Establishes comprehensive risk framework and ensures compliance with regulatory requirements. Protects the firm's capital and maintains strong risk culture across all operations.

name: Noboru Ito
title: General Counsel
bio: Leads legal affairs and compliance initiatives, manages corporate governance, and facilitates regulatory relationships. Protects the firm's interests in all legal matters.

name: Yuki Saito
title: Chief Operating Officer
bio: Oversees operational efficiency and technology infrastructure across all business units. Drives process improvement and innovation to support business growth.
